mano_cua.result_summary: 键盘无障碍完全缺失：搜索输入框无 ARIA combobox 角色属性（无 role/aria-autocomplete/aria-controls/aria-expanded/aria-activedescendant），方向键无法在 emoji 列表中导航移动焦点，整个 picker 无任何 role 属性（querySelectorAll('[role]') 返回空数组），emoji 列表容器无 role='listbox'/'grid'
mano_cua.last_reasoning: CRITICAL ACCESSIBILITY INFORMATION REVEALED! The Accessibility panel is now showing for the selected input#emoji-mart-search-1 element. ARIA Attributes section: 'No ARIA attributes' - This confirms no ARIA attributes are set on the search input! Computed Properties: Name: 'Search' (from label for= attribute). MISSING: NO role attribute (plain input type=search with NO combobox role), NO aria-autocomplete, NO aria-controls, NO aria-expanded, NO aria-haspopup, NO aria-activedescendant. The message 'No ARIA attributes' in the ARIA Attributes section is the clearest possible confirmation that the search input completely lacks ARIA role and state attributes.
